lean startup.text: (Observe–Orient–Decide–Act) has been advocated by Colonel John Boyd. In the lean startup methodology, the Build-Measure-Learn loop is used to guide product development.

combination of business-hypothesis-driven experimentation, iterative product releases, and validated learning. Lean startup emphasizes customer feedback over intuition and flexibility over planning. This
